zh.lifeSummary: Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne是Niels Claesson和Ebba Arendsdotter的女兒，於1490年出生在瑞典。她於1527年之前與Göran Lindormsson Forstena結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1561年在瑞典斯卡拉波格斯特洛享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne是Niels Claesson和Ebba Arendsdotter的女儿，于1490年出生在瑞典。她于1527年之前与Göran Lindormsson Forstena结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1561年在瑞典斯卡拉波格斯特洛享年71岁。

historicEvents.title: The Russo-Swedish War
historicEvents.description: While in an alliance with Grand Prince Ivan III of Moscow, King Hans of Denmark and Norway invaded Sweden and was declared King of Sweden.

historicEvents.title: The Stockholm Bloodbath
historicEvents.description: A mass execution of Swedish nobles by Danish king Christian II is known as the Stockholm Bloodbath. Christian II invaded Sweden in 1519 and took hold of Stockholm in September 1520. Over 80 nobles were executed for heresy on November 8 and 9. The outrage from the executions led to the Swedish removal of support of the Kalmar Union.

historicEvents.title: Swedish War of Liberation
historicEvents.description: The Swedish War of Liberation was a civil war led by nobleman Gustav Vasa. As Christian II heard of the rebellion, he confronted Vasa's men, who won the battle at Brunbacks Ferry. Christian II was defeated by the Swedes in Stockholm and a truce was agreed upon. Vasa was given as a hostage as a show of good faith until the treaty was signed. The Danish King did not keep his word and Vasa was held as a prisoner for two years until his escape. A bounty was placed on Vasa's head. Vasa worked to inspire many to join his cause and lived under disguise until the Danes surrendered in 1525.

historicEvents.title: The Protestant Reformation
historicEvents.description: The Protestant Reformation in Sweden occurred as King Gustav Vasa of Sweden, aided by his chancellor Laurentius Andreae, a Swedish Lutheran clergyman, broke ties with Rome and the Roman Catholic church in 1527.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.

en.lifeSummary: Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne was born in 1490, in Sweden as the daughter of Niels Claesson and Ebba Arendsdotter. She married Göran Lindormsson Forstena before 1527. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1561, in Strö, Skaraborg, Sweden, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne est née en 1490, à Suède, fille de Niels Claesson et Ebba Arendsdotter. Elle a épousé Göran Lindormsson Forstena avant 1527. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1561, à Strö, Skaraborg, Suède, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne wurde 1490 in Schweden, als Tochter von Niels Claesson und Ebba Arendsdotter geboren. Sie hat vor 1527 Göran Lindormsson Forstena geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1561 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Strö, Skaraborg, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne è nata il nel 1490 nel Svezia come figlia di Niels Claesson e Ebba Arendsdotter. Lei sposato Göran Lindormsson Forstena prima del 1527. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1561, nel Strö, Skaraborg, Svezia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåneは1490年にスウェーデンでNiels ClaessonとEbba Arendsdotterの娘として生まれた。1527年以前にGöran Lindormsson Forstenaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1561年にスウェーデンスカラボルグストルoで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne(은)는 1490년 스웨덴에서 Niels Claesson(와)과 Ebba Arendsdotter의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1527년 이전 Göran Lindormsson Forstena(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1561년 스웨덴 스카라볼그 스트o에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne nasceu em 1490, em Suécia filha de Niels Claesson e Ebba Arendsdotter. Ela casou-se com Göran Lindormsson Forstena antes 1527. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1561, em Strö, Skaraborg, Suécia, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne родилась в 1490 г. в местности Швеция. Её родителей звали Niels Claesson и Ebba Arendsdotter. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Göran Lindormsson Forstena перед 1527 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1561 г. в местности стрo, скараборг, Швеция в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne nació en 1490, en Suecia como hija de Niels Claesson y Ebba Arendsdotter. Se casó con Göran Lindormsson Forstena antes de 1527. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1561, en Strö, Skaraborg, Suecia, a la edad de 71 años.
